variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses 'Sales and distribution costs', which is a core SG&A overhead bucket present in the statement. Because no single explicit SG&A total row exists, selected the main overhead components: Sales and distribution costs, Administrative expenses, and Other operating expenses, net. Included Research and development costs as well because it is separately reported and does not appear embedded in the selected buckets; PROF later subtracts XRD from XSGA_COMPONENTS. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales and distribution costs, [Income Statement] Research and development costs
